title: berlandiera pumila
intro: Berlandiera pumila, also known as Dwarf Firewheel or Red Maid, is a low-growing, shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as its potential to support digestive health. The herbal preparations of Berlandiera pumila include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
